outcome.reason: Types are structurally exposed through pub NateroidSettings, narrowing causes E0446

outcome.summary: ** Removed the `dead_code` allowances in `src/switches.rs` by deleting the unused inspector helpers, and removed the test-only `clippy::float_cmp` allowance in `src/playfield/boundary/teleport.rs` by switching the assertions to explicit epsilon helpers.

outcome.reason: ** `CameraSettings` is re-exported from `src/camera/mod.rs`, so renaming its public `bloom_*` and `splash_start_*` fields would have changed exported API shape without explicit approval.
outcome.summary: ** Reworked the internal-only `StarSettings` shape to use nested `StarColorSettings` and `StarTwinkleSettings`, removing the repeated `color_white_` and `twinkle_` field prefixes from that resource.
** Renamed the flagged bindings to their concrete type names in `camera/lights.rs`, `camera/selection.rs`, and `actor/actor_settings.rs` so the call sites read without relying on type inference.

** Replaced the uncertain `GameState::Launch` commentary with the actual startup sequencing invariant, and rewrote the star twinkling selection path to sample against the actual untwinkling query snapshot while documenting that bounded-sampling constraint directly.

** Converted `src/playfield/portals.rs` into `src/playfield/portals/mod.rs` and moved the concrete implementations into `actor_portals.rs`, `portal.rs`, and `portal_settings.rs` while keeping the existing portal plugin wiring and re-exports intact.
** Named the new portal children after their owned type clusters: `portal_settings.rs`, `actor_portals.rs`, and `portal.rs`, with each file now owning the matching anchor type and its nearby logic.
** Moved the portal update, fade, draw, and geometry-support helpers next to `ActorPortals` and `Portal` so the portal domain is organized by owned types instead of one flat procedural file.
** Updated the `Portal` geometry doc comments in `src/playfield/types.rs` so identifier references such as `Portal` and `BoundaryFace` are wrapped in backticks.

** Moved grid gizmo and flash types into `src/playfield/boundary/gizmo.rs`, moved portal geometry and intersection helpers into `src/playfield/boundary/portal_render.rs`, removed `src/playfield/types.rs`, and preserved the public `playfield::GridFlash` re-export.
** Reworked the teleport tests to derive expected wrapped positions from helper functions built on the boundary transform extents, instead of hardcoded wrapped coordinates.

** Moved missile despawn threshold handling into `missile_movement` where distance changes occur, and restricted lethal-health despawn handling to `Changed<Health>` entities instead of scanning every `Health` each frame.

** Renamed generic `settings` and `config` resource bindings to type-named bindings across the cited actor and camera modules, including `missile_settings`, `nateroid_settings`, `aabb_settings`, `focus_settings`, and `star_settings`.

** Replaced `BoundaryFace::from_normal` with `impl TryFrom<Dir3> for BoundaryFace` in `src/playfield/boundary_face.rs`. Updated the portal call sites to use `BoundaryFace::try_from(...)`, preserving the previous fallback and optional-conversion behavior.

** Moved `MissileSettings` into `src/actor/missile.rs`, `SpaceshipSettings` into `src/actor/spaceship.rs`, and `NateroidSettings` plus `DeathCorner` into `src/actor/nateroid/mod.rs`. Reduced `src/actor/actor_template.rs` to the shared `GameLayer` enum and updated all inspector, spawn, teleport, despawn, and control imports to use the new ownership paths while preserving the existing `crate::actor` re-exports.

** Renamed `src/camera/components.rs` to `src/camera/required_camera_components.rs` and `src/camera/support.rs` to `src/camera/rendering.rs`. Swept the corresponding `mod` declarations, `use` paths, and `RenderLayer` re-export so camera call sites now reference the predictive module names.

** Hoisted the tunable example values in `examples/bloom_layer_bug.rs` into named top-of-file constants for layer ids, camera orders/transforms, sphere placement, colors, and light illuminance. Lowercased the `//` section labels in every cited `constants.rs` file without changing the documented constants or their organization.

outcome.reason: ** Rust-analyzer `findReferences` requests timed out in this workspace, so the relocation pass fell back to crate-wide `rg` searches before moving the portal-render symbols.
outcome.summary: ** Replaced `src/playfield/boundary/portal_render.rs` with `src/playfield/boundary/portal_render/mod.rs` plus `drawing.rs`, `geometry.rs`, and `intersection.rs`, moving geometry classification, rendering orchestration, and intersection helpers into separate domain files. Preserved the existing `crate::playfield::boundary::PortalActorKind`, `Boundary::draw_portal`, and `Boundary::calculate_portal_face_count` entry points so the refactor stayed internal.

** Moved the cited inline presentation defaults into the owning constants modules and switched each call site to the named constant. This covered actor AABB and flame colors, camera light defaults, boundary base color/start alpha, portal default colors, and the splash skip-hint color.

outcome.reason: ** `rust_analyzer` reference queries timed out on the private module declarations in `src/camera/mod.rs`, so I fell back to a whole-crate `rg` sweep for the module-path rename and verified that no old module names remained.
outcome.summary: ** Renamed `src/camera/camera_game.rs`, `camera_star.rs`, `camera_ui.rs`, and `required_camera_components.rs` to `game.rs`, `star.rs`, `ui.rs`, and `required_components.rs`, then updated `src/camera/mod.rs` plus the dependent intra-camera imports to use the new module names.

** Moved all 13 asset-path literals from `src/asset_loader.rs` into new `pub(crate)` constants in `src/constants.rs`, then imported those constants back into `asset_loader.rs` and replaced every inline `asset_server.load("...")` call with the named constant form.

outcome.reason: ** `rust-analyzer` reference lookups timed out in this environment, so rename coverage was verified with crate-wide `rg` sweeps before and after editing instead of LSP reference results.
outcome.summary: ** Renamed every cited local binding to a spelled-out form across `src/splash.rs`, `src/asset_loader.rs`, `src/camera/stars.rs`, `src/camera/game.rs`, and `src/camera/zoom.rs`, including the adjacent uses and format-string captures at each site.
CameraSettings fields drop the natural settings type names
star camera module is not named after StarCamera anchor type
